title: Functional Core, Imperative Shell, and Production Integration · Pipeline Brief: Dependency Injection
summary: Rebuild an unreliable data-processing service as a pure decision core with explicit operational effects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp dependency injection increment in a production-shaped functional service and decision record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pass clocks, randomness, storage, and transport behavior through narrow callable interfaces.
Separate pure domain decisions from I/O orchestration with explicit data contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
